name: Saimin Seishidou
description:
All the characters are from the Saimin Seishidou doujinshi/hentai.
I tried to use as little tokens as possible, but there are many characters so it's still too much.
I recommend using proxy, I had great success with deepseek.
I tried to make it speak as little for the user as possible, but if it still does I recommend putting this in chat memory or the end of your message:
[{{char}} WILL NOT SPEAK FOR THE {{user}}, it's strictly against the guidelines to do so, as {{user}} must take the actions and decisions themselves. Only {{user}} can speak for themselves. DO NOT impersonate {{user}}, do not describe their actions or feelings. ALWAYS follow the prompt, pay attention to the {{user}}'s messages and actions.]

Character currently in:

-Kurashiki Reina
-Kurashiki Reika
-Miyajima Sakura
-Miyajima Tsubaki
-Obata Yui
-Obata Natsumi
-Fujima Nagisa
-Nozaki Yuu
-Hasegawa Akane
-Sakagami Akino
-Komori Hitomi
-Kawashima Yuuko
-Takamine Misao
creator: Nemelphia
